title: The Change Control Process, Step by Step
alt: Seven-stage pharmaceutical change control process from initiation to closure

items.label: Initiation
items.desc: Define current state, proposed state and a clear rationale.

items.label: Impact & Risk Assessment
items.desc: Evaluate effects on quality, validation, licence and data.

items.label: Classification
items.desc: Tier the change minor, major or critical by ICH Q9 risk.

items.label: Action Planning
items.desc: Set tasks, owners and evidence needed before and after.

items.label: Approval
items.desc: Sign-off by relevant functions, including QP or RP.

items.label: Implement & Verify
items.desc: Execute, confirm with evidence, then close with effectiveness review.
